Interface MetaEcoreHelper

public interface MetaEcoreHelper
Simon's conventions layered on top of Ecore: the mapping between the @Meta.* annotation DSL, marker EAnnotations, and the roles features and classifiers can play.

Owns the "simon.annotations" annotation source and the tag vocabulary stored under it ("rootComposite", NAME_FEATURE, DOCUMENTATION_FEATURE, etc.), as well as the "__value__" convention used to back wrapped primitive values.

Members fall into four groups:

  • Predicates over Java classes and Ecore classifiers — isPackage(Class), isObjectType(Class), isPrimitive(EClassifier), isRecord(EClassifier), isRootComposite(EClass), isNamed(EClass).
  • Marker writers used during metamodel construction — makeRootComposite(EClass), makeRecordType(EClass), makePrimitiveType(EClass, Metamodel.PrimitiveKind), markAsName(EAttribute), markAsDocumentation(EAttribute).
  • Role lookups that find the structural feature playing a given role on an EClass — getNameAttribute(EObject), getDocumentationAttribute(EClass), getValueFeature(EClass).
  • Java-to-Ecore primitive bridging — getPrimitiveKind(EClassifier), getPrimitiveEType(Metamodel.PrimitiveKind), getPrimitiveETypeOrNull(Metamodel.PrimitiveKind).

Inputs are typically metamodel-layer entities: an EClass, an EAttribute, or a Java Class<?> authored with the @Meta DSL. Per-instance state of model objects is out of scope.
